html: (a ruin), a town in the north of Palestine, belonging to the tribe of Naphtali. It was taken and plundered by the captains of Ben-hadad, (1�Kings 15:20; 2�Chronicles 16:4) and a second time by Tiglath-pileser. (2�Kings 16:29) It was situated a few miles northwest of the site of Dan, in a fertile and beautiful little plain called Merj� Ayun .
